# True Detective
> Licensed private detective agency based in Warsaw, Poland. License number 0007982.

## Main page
- [True Detective](https://truedetective.pl/): Comprehensive detective services in Warsaw and Mazowieckie Voivodeship. Surveillance, infidelity investigation, background checks, corporate investigations.
